top.title: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
top.summary: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".

top.title: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
top.summary: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.

top.title: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
top.summary: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.

top.title: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
top.summary: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.

top.title: I brought my husband back for his funeral as a hologram
top.summary: After nearly 60 years of marriage, Pam wanted to honour her husband Bill with a hologram at his funeral.

top.title: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
top.summary: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
